title: MikuEnderman
description: A Minecraft resource pack that transforms Endermen into Hatsune Miku with custom anime-style models, themed audio, and 64x HD textures, compatible with Java Edition 1.20.x-1.21.x.
body:
# 末影初音 | 初音未来×末影人 主题资源包 🎵
# Enderman Miku | Hatsune Miku × Enderman Themed Resource Pack 🎵

将Minecraft中的末影人重绘为初音未来。
Redesigns Minecraft's Enderman into Hatsune Miku with a blocky anime art style.

## ✨ 功能亮点
## ✨ Key Features
🎶**实体**：末影人模型完全重制为初音未来造型
🎶**Entity**：Enderman model fully remade into Hatsune Miku's iconic look, including twin tails and signature outfit
🎶**音效**：替换末影人移动、攻击音效为初音未来风格
🎶**Audio**：Replaces Enderman movement/attack sounds with Hatsune Miku-style electronic audio
🎶**纹理**：采用64x分辨率绘制，细节清晰，适配现代MC版本的视觉体验
🎶**Textures**：64x resolution textures with crisp details, optimized for modern Minecraft versions

## 🎮 兼容版本
## 🎮 Compatible Versions
🎶Minecraft Java Edition 1.20.x ~ 1.21.x
🎶Minecraft Java Edition 1.20.x ~ 1.21.x
